name: Eric Andre
bio: Eric Andre is an American comedian, actor, and television host best known as the creator and host of Adult Swim's anti-talk-show The Eric Andre Show, a chaotic parody of public-access programming built on pranks and shock comedy. His stand-up extends that high-energy, absurdist sensibility, anchored by his 2020 Netflix special Legalize Everything. He also creates prank-based film work and performs music under the name Blarf.

timeline.ev: The Eric Andre Show premieres on Adult Swim
Creates and stars in the prank film Bad Trip
Wins a Primetime Emmy for The Eric Andre Show

accolades: Emmy Award for Outstanding Performer in a Short Form Comedy or Drama Series (2024)
Creator and host of the long-running The Eric Andre Show (2012-2023)

bits.t: The Highest He has Ever Been
